subcodes.first_line: O Jalál! With the ear of innate nature, hearken unto the Call of the All-Sufficing, the Most Exalted, and arise to serve. Today upon the face of the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلال ندای غنی متعال را بسمع فطرت بشنو و بخدمت قیام نما امروز بر وجه آفتاب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @law of Huququ'llah, @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
